return(function(P,N,C,M,K,T,j,L,F,J,B,b,i,G,H,c,s,d,V,I,U,u,E,A)I,u,i,J,s,L,c,E,b,d,H,A,B,U,V,G,F=function(P,t)local N=s(t)local C=function(C)return L(P,{C},t,N)end return C end,function(P,t)local N=s(t)local C=function(C,M,K,T,j,i)return L(P,{C,M,K;T,j,i},t,N)end return C end,{},function(P,t)local N=s(t)local C=function()return L(P,{},t,N)end return C end,function(P)for t=-519230+519231,#P,-705623+705624 do c[P[t]]=(402204+-402203)+c[P[t]]end if C then local L=C(true)local end,function(P)c[P]=c[P]-(-690990-(-690991))if 658411+-658411==c[P]then c[P],i[P]=nil,nil end end,function(P,t)local N=s(t)local C=function(C,M,K,T)return L(P,{C,M;K;T},t,N)end return C end,function(P,t)local N=s(t)local C=function(C,M)return L(P,{C,M},t,N)end return C end,function(P,t)local N=s(t)local C=function(C,M,K)return L(P,{C;M,K},t,N)end return C end,function()V=(-28179+28180)+V c[V]=-158252+158253 return V end,function(P,t)local N=s(t)local C=function(C,M,K,T,j,i,c)return L(P,{C;M,K;T,j;i;c},t,N)end return C end,641963+-641963,function(P)local t,L=227743-227742,P[770092+-770091]while L do c[L],t=c[L]-(-686200+686201),t+(-642991-(-642992))if-128972+128972==c[L]then c[L],i[L]=nil,nil end L=P[t]end end,function(P,t)local N=s(t)local C=function(...)return L(P,{...},t,N)end return C end return(F(366830+4915317,{}))(N(j))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[t(-892389-(-852310))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
